steps.t: Captain Hanâbu has gone ahead to attack the Ordâkhai forward camp, Jolakhúro. You should meet up with Captain Hanâbu outside Jolakhúro.
You have done much to clear the path to Emax Dûl. You should talk to Captain Hanâbu outside Jolakhúro.
Mizâdi has gone ahead with her Subuzûri to claim the bridge to Emax Dûl. You should meet Mizâdi just up the road from Jolakhúro.
